arts.sum: Deportivo Alaves remain in the relegation places, just one point away from 17th place. Inconsistency is troubling the home side, winning one, drawing two, and losing two of their previous five league ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Alaves vs. Real Sociedad - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's La Liga clash between Alaves and Real Sociedad, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
